JUDGE RONALD EVANS QUIDACHAY, CLERK NICOLE OLCOMENDY, REPORTER BELDON YEE. MASTER JURY CALENDAR OF JAN-14-2002 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON JAN-14-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 611.

JUDGE DIANE WICK, CLERK-BETH WILBER, REPORTER-BRENDA FIELDS: C/C FOR JURY TRIAL ALL PRESENT. DEFT'S JURY DEMAND IS STRICKEN BY THE COURT FOR DEFT'S FAILURE TO HAVE JURY INSTRUCTIONS. CASE PROCEEDS AS A COURT TRIAL. AFTER BOTH PARTIES HAVE PRESENTED THEIR RESPECTIVE CASES THE MATTER IS SUMBITTED. THE COURT RULES IN FAVOR OF THE PLAINTIFF AND PLAINTIFF SUBMITS A JUDGMENT FORM.
